message:
fix(patterns): reject commands with embedded newlines to prevent injection

Adds security check for embedded newlines/carriage returns in commands:

Before: "cargo build\nrm -rf /" would be classified as compilation
After: Rejected with "contains embedded newline" reason

Security rationale:
- Commands are passed to `sh -c` for execution
- Embedded newlines effectively execute multiple commands
- Attacker could append malicious command after legitimate one
- Example: "cargo build\nrm -rf /" would run both commands

The check runs early in check_structure() to fail fast before
any pattern matching on the command content.

Adds regression tests for both \n and \r\n variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
